meanings.meaning: 击弦古钢琴，一种古老的键盘乐器
meanings.usage: 可数名词，指一种18世纪前的键盘乐器
可数名词，可指音乐乐器或科学仪器
及物动词，表示使某物受损
及物动词，表示让人感到震惊
及物动词，表示修补损坏的东西
可数名词，乐器上的弦为复数形式strings
不及物动词，常用结构：belong to
及物动词，常用结构：be allowed to do
及物动词，表示用力敲击
副词，修饰动词，表示力度大
及物动词，表示将某物保存在某处
副词，通常与过去时连用
可数名词，指爸爸或妈妈的爸爸

phrases.usage: 属于，表示所有权或归属关系

examples.en: This house belongs to our family.

phrases.usage: 尝试做某事，努力去做但不一定成功

examples.en: She tried to play jazz on it.
examples.zh: 她试着在上面弹爵士乐。

phrases.usage: 感到震惊，表示对某事感到惊讶

examples.en: My father was shocked when he heard the news.
examples.zh: 我父亲听到这个消息时很震惊。

examples.en: Now we are not allowed to touch it.
examples.zh: 现在我们不被允许碰它。

examples.en: She struck the keys too hard.
It was made in Germany in 1681.

phrases.usage: 很多年前，表示过去的时间

examples.en: The instrument was bought many years ago.
examples.zh: 这件乐器是多年前买的。

phrases.usage: 正在被...，现在进行时的被动语态

examples.en: It is being repaired by a friend of my father's.
examples.zh: 它正在被我父亲的一个朋友修理。

phrases.usage: 我父亲的...朋友，双重所有格用法

examples.en: It is being repaired by a friend of my father's.
examples.zh: 它正在被我父亲的一个朋友修理。

phrases.usage: 最近，用于谈论近期发生的事情

examples.en: Recently it was damaged by a visitor.
examples.zh: 最近它被一个访客损坏了。

grammar.title: 一般过去时的被动语态
grammar.definition: 当主语是动作的承受者时，使用被动语态。过去时的被动语态表示过去某个动作施加于主语
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 过去分词 (+ by + 动作执行者)
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去发生的动作，主语是动作的承受者

examples.en: It was made in Germany in 1681.
The instrument was bought by my grandfather many years ago.
examples.zh: 这件乐器是多年前被我祖父买的。

examples.en: It was damaged by a visitor recently.
examples.zh: 它最近被一个访客损坏了。

grammar.title: 现在进行时的被动语态
grammar.definition: 表示说话时正在进行的被动动作，即某事正在被做
grammar.structure: 主语 + am/is/are + being + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 强调某个动作正在进行中，且主语是动作的承受者

examples.en: It is being repaired by a friend of my father's.
examples.zh: 它正在被我父亲的一个朋友修理。

examples.en: The house is being painted now.
The work is being done by the students.

grammar.title: 时间表达：ago与recently
grammar.definition: ago表示从现在算起的过去时间点，recently表示离现在不远的时间
grammar.usage: ago用于过去时，recently可用于过去时或现在完成时

examples.en: She bought it many years ago.
Recently it was damaged by a visitor.
examples.zh: 最近它被一个访客损坏了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It was made in + 地点 + 时间

original.en: It was made in Germany in 1681.

imitations.en: It was made in China in 2020.
This watch was made in Switzerland.
imitations.zh: 这块手表是瑞士制造的。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It has belonged to... for + 时间段

original.en: It has belonged to our family for a long time.
original.zh: 它已经属于我们家族很长时间了。

imitations.en: This house has belonged to us for ten years.
imitations.zh: 这房子已经属于我们十年了。

imitations.en: The car has belonged to my father for five years.
imitations.zh: 这辆车已经属于我父亲五年了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is being + 过去分词 + by...

original.en: It is being repaired by a friend of my father's.
original.zh: 它正在被我父亲的一个朋友修理。

imitations.en: The car is being washed by Tom.
The room is being cleaned by my mother.
imitations.zh: 房间正在被我妈妈打扫。
